name: @chbrain/khai-engine-empathy
description: khai engine content, the empathy domain: empathy as position, the baseline capacity a persona holds for taking in the inner state of another -- cognitive, affective, compassionate, or distressed.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Empathy as position: the baseline capacity a persona holds for taking in the inner state of another -- how open the channel is and what form the opening takes.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_empathy.md) declares the baseline capacity to take in another's inner state -- the channel and its width -- before any particular other has appeared.
card.issue: Four expressions a persona may hold: cognitive (perspective-taking without resonance), affective (resonance -- feels what the other feels), compassionate (moved to act on the other's behalf), and distressed (overwhelmed; the channel takes in more than it can hold). Each is a distinct form of other-directed reception.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the expression it holds as its baseline empathic mode.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real empathy expression. Whether the expression is true to the persona's history is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its mode under Projection. Read it in how the persona meets another's distress -- the channel is open before any decision to look.
